'''Virevols''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|non-sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] of saber-[[Tooth/Legends|toothed]] [[Rat/Legends|rat]] found only on [[Despayre]],<ref name="DS" /> a [[Prison/Legends|prison]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] in the [[Atrivis sector/Legends|Atrivis sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="Star Wars: Rebellion video game">[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']]</ref> The virevol could grow to the size of [[Wolf/Legends|wolves]], and were considered formidable creatures by the [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoners]] on Despayre. A [[Brigian]] [[Unidentified Brigian prisoner|prisoner]]—known to be a former [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]]—was rumored to have [[Death/Legends|killed]] a virevol with only a stick, after which he was supposed to have cooked and [[Diet/Legends|eaten]] it. All the virevol on Despayre perished with the [[Destruction of Despayre|destruction]] of the planet by the first [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]]<ref name="DS" /> in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' places the [[attack on the first Death Star]] and the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. As [[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] establishes that the [[Destruction of Despayre]] occurs between these two events, it too must occur in 0 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]].</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The virevols were created by [[Michael Reaves]] and [[Steve Perry]] in their [[2007]] novel [[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']].<ref name="DS" />
